title: Lucky's Cozy Home: Refurnished
body:
![1](https://i.imgur.com/A1mNsOc.gif)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74489615ffcd40460687045825f73183a77299c4.png)
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d272f4b6725d63761406bd94fb5f7e6a5873b6e.gif)
![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d186ae47cc54f221a4ea490e29988bbe0327664b.png)
![5](https://i.imgur.com/nIzToHV.gif)
![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c9118b81d8833c218a93f160ce843b655f62638.png)
![7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/218692a426ab77e561277e635166a30b96a36397.png)
![8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12269709d6668ee09a8abf8580e0bec8fe7f288b.png)

Transform your Minecraft builds with **Cozy Home**, a vanilla-friendly furniture mod that adds stylized furniture and functionality to your world! This mod introduces a wide variety of furniture in numerous styles, from rustic, traditional, modern, and even evil and ominous sets, all ensuring there’s something to match any aesthetic.

But it’s not just about looks—many furniture pieces come with unique functionality! Sit on chairs, use working drawers for storage, place decorative items on tables, or light up your space with stylish lamps. 

Customize your furniture by applying cushions and drapes on them or even try dyeing various set pieces to fit your exact taste. 

Travel the world in search of unique furniture pieces and sets that aren't craftable. Whether you're designing a cozy cottage, a grand castle, or a modern home, **Cozy Home** has the perfect furniture to bring your vision to life.

Craft, decorate, and interact—it's time to make your builds feel like home!

### **Blocks**

- Kitchen Counters - Comes in storage and sink variants. Can use the sink to remove dye from objects and copy basic cauldron features.
- Tables - Can connect to combine into larger tables.
- Chairs - Can sit on them, tuck them into tables and place cushions on them to further improve their design.
- Wall Clocks - Tells the time when right-clicked (Hands move to the correct in-game time)
- Grandfather Clocks - Similar to clocks, though at midnight they play a tune (And have a swinging pendulum)
- Lamps - A small light block that can be dyed and stacked onto of one another to create a larger one.
- Sofas - Can sit and customize them with dye and cushions. Connect like stair blocks
- Wall Mirrors - Can right-click to see yourself into them. Can stack vertically to connect.
- Fountains - A multi use block with many functions, can store liquids in them. They can connect to each other to create diverse designs.
- Fountains Sprouts - Pour liquid out of fountains or waterlogged blocks it connects to. Great for aesthetic designs
- New Glass - Many new glass blocks and panes to help with designs (Autumn Patterned Stained Glass)
- Telescope - Learn interesting facts about Minecraft’s Lunar Cycles when right-clicking at night! Needs access to the sky.
- Dye Vat - A block used to dye the various block in the mod and game. Works well with the brush item.

### **Items**

- Paint Brush - Can be used on a dye vat to set a color on the brush. Can then go around painting blocks to that set color repeatedly.
- Cushion - Used on various blocks to add a cushion on them. Can be dyed.
- Hay Cushion - A type of cushion that looks like hay, NOT dyeable.
- Trader’s Cushion - A rare type of cushion that has the wandering traders style.

### Furniture Sets

- Oak
- Spruce
- Birch
- Jungle
- Acacia
- Dark Oak
- Mangrove
- Cherry
- Bamboo
- Crimson
- Warped
- Iron
- Glass
- Undead
- Ominous
- More to come…
